## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or need. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references. Mention which roadmap phase this relates to if applicable.
